title: The Ultimate Guide to Video Schema Markup for AEO
excerpt: Unlock the technical secrets of VideoObject schema markup to ensure your video content is perfectly structured for Google's AI Overviews and traditional carousels.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
If search engines can't understand the context of your video, it won't rank. Enter VideoObject schema markup.

Essential Properties for AEO

Beyond the standard name, description, and thumbnail, you must use hasPart (Clip schema) to break your video into timestamped segments. This allows Answer Engines to point users directly to the 15-second clip that exactly answers their query, dramatically increasing your chances of being featured.
